Recomputation of Annuity Rates, , which related to recomputation of annuity rates, was repealed by , , .Act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title XI, § 111260 Stat. 1035Pub. L. 96–465, title II, § 2205(1)94 Stat. 2159Oct. 17, 1980

Computation of Annuities of Participants Retiring During the Period Beginning and EndingOctober 1, 1978December 31, 1979, , , which provided that the annuity of any participant in the Foreign Service Retirement and Disability System whose salary was or is limited by and who retired during the period beginning and ending , would be equal to 2 per centum of his or her basic salary for the highest year of service for which contributions had been made to the Foreign Service Retirement and Disability Fund multiplied by the number of years, not exceeding thirty-five, of service credit obtained in accordance with sections 1091 and 1093 of this title, was repealed by , , .Pub.
